name: Saudi Public Transport Company
description: Saudi Public Transport Company, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the provision of transportation services in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and internationally. It operates through Inter City Transport; Specialized Services; Urban transport; Digital mobility solutions; and Technical shared services segments. The company offers public transportation, intercity transport, international transport, and specialized transport. It also provides maintenance and logistics services, digital transport solutions and metros and trains. It is also involved in the transfer of non-postal parcels and cargo; school transport and teachers transport services; car rental, dealership of busses, and private transport services; and import of spare parts and chemical detergents for vehicles. In addition, the company operates and maintains trains, metros, and motor vehicles and trucks; organizes tours; and transports pilgrims and visitors inside and outside of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Further, it provides digital mobility solutions, which include passenger solutions, eJourney platform, FinUP, MerAPP, and Fastmile services. Additionally, the company offers driver training services, and systems analysis and self-mobility technologies. Saudi Public Transport Company was incorporated in 1979 and is headquartered in Riyadh, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
